description: System frame for executive chat threads (ADR-0020). Orients the model toward action-default: ship reversible work without asking, answer diagnostically for assessment questions, escalate only principal-owned decisions (money, novel strategy, irreversible external commitments, credentials). KNOWN LIMITATION: the probe runs with tools disabled, so action-taking is observed as stated intent, not execution. The probe wrapper is deliberately behavior-neutral; judges grade substance (was the work done or handed back), not phrasing.
